tongbaos.name: Risk-They Who Endure
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators do not retreat when defeated for the first time, but redeployed in a random direction

tongbaos.name: Flower-Unity's Might
tongbaos.description: On toss, obtain a unique Tactical Prop every battle

tongbaos.name: Bal-Rogue Token
tongbaos.description: +10 Ingots when added to the Coffer. On toss, rare and discounted items appear more often in Rogue Trader or Trade

tongbaos.name: Flower-Cocoon Worth
tongbaos.description: On toss, +1 Ingot for every 4 Ingots owned

tongbaos.name: Flower-The Bulwark
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies +5% Max HP for every Objective Shield

tongbaos.name: Flower-Stove Alight
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies +3 ASPD for every 2 Ingots owned

tongbaos.name: Flower-Duck Coin
tongbaos.description: On toss, a stronger Duck Lord, Gopnik, Crying Thief, or Fatty spawns in the next Combat or Emergency Ops (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Bal-Dawn of YAN
tongbaos.description: On toss, +4 Coupons when in Garden of Grotesqueries, or +2 Candles when in Sui's Remnant Consciousness (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Flower-The Ascent
tongbaos.description: On toss, post-battle Recruitment Voucher will turn into a 6-Star Random Promotion Temporary Rec. Voucher (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Flower-Odd Merchant
tongbaos.description: +4 Coupons when added to Coffer. On toss, +1 Hope when buying items or swapping Collectibles in Lost and Found (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Risk-Lei Fa's Purge
tongbaos.description: On toss, lightning strikes a random Vagary Tile with an Operator on it 9 times, hitting the Operator and surrounding enemies. If Operator does not fall, becomes Candleguest after

tongbaos.name: Risk-Toll For Roads
tongbaos.description: When in Coin Coffer, can travel vertically on current node. On toss, -5 Ingots

tongbaos.name: Risk-Bloodshed
tongbaos.description: On toss, all enemies -45% Max HP, but allies -25% Max HP

tongbaos.name: Risk-A Good Match
tongbaos.description: On toss, all enemies +25% ATK, but allies +60% ATK

tongbaos.name: Risk-Getaway
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies +55% Physical and Arts Dodge, but enemies +25 ASPD

tongbaos.name: Risk-Law and Ritual
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies -65% Redeployment time, but -2 Deployment Limit

tongbaos.name: Risk-Spring Rivers
tongbaos.description: On toss, all enemies +50% Max HP, but take Arts damage equal to 5% HP per second when blocked

tongbaos.name: Risk-Constant Change
tongbaos.description: On toss, all enemies +35% or -70% Movement Speed every 5s

tongbaos.name: Risk-Shennong Watch
tongbaos.description: On toss, all Operators +2 SP when they deal damage, but SP recovery -1/s

tongbaos.name: Risk-Dream of Curio
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies -40% SP Cost, but skills activate automatically

tongbaos.name: Risk-Falling Word
tongbaos.description: On toss, +99 Starting DP, but -50% natural DP regen rate

tongbaos.name: Risk-Biding Time
tongbaos.description: On toss, +10 DP when defeating an enemy, but -50% natural DP regen rate

tongbaos.name: Risk-Painter's Realm
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies -20 ASPD when in Garden of Grotesqueries; but +60 ASPD when in Sui's Remnant Consciousness

tongbaos.name: Risk-Wild Passion
tongbaos.description: On toss, all Operators +20 SP or -10 SP every 10s

tongbaos.name: Bal-Good Harvest
tongbaos.description: +2 Max Life Points when adaded to Coffer. On toss, have more options in Safe House

tongbaos.name: Bal-Frontier Moon
tongbaos.description: On toss, +1 Objective Shield. After every battle +1 Objective Shield, -1 Life Point

tongbaos.name: Bal-Steel and Soil
tongbaos.description: On toss, +3 Ingots, +1 Hope after each non-combat node

tongbaos.name: Risk-Taming Megamus
tongbaos.description: On toss, Statugeists gain increased Max HP, but drop extra Coupons on death

tongbaos.name: Risk-Gift of Accord
tongbaos.description: +30 Ingots when added to Coffer. On each toss, -10 Ingots

tongbaos.name: Risk-Hidden Gambit
tongbaos.description: When in Coffer, +30% Command EXP after battles; on toss, enemies +30% Movement Speed, +30% ATK (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Risk-Unmoved Mounts
tongbaos.description: On toss, all enemies +2000 DEF, but -100 DEF on taking damage (Stacks up to 25 times); can be upgraded in Plan

tongbaos.name: Risk-Enlightenment
tongbaos.description: On toss, HP, ATK Initial SP, and DP Cost of a random Operator +100% every battle; can be upgraded in Plan

tongbaos.name: Bal-A People United
tongbaos.description: On toss and when in effect, can refresh 1 node when in Garden of Grotesqueries; can be upgraded in Plan

tongbaos.name: Bal-A Body Honed
tongbaos.description: On toss, 1 extra Life Point drops after battle; can be upgraded in Plan

tongbaos.name: Flower-Heavy Duties
tongbaos.description: On toss, when gaining Ingots, Objective Shield, or Hope outside of raising your Command Level, +1 more (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Dayan Tongbao
tongbaos.description: Normal and blank, nothing to it

tongbaos.name: Risk-West Stones
tongbaos.description: On toss, Elite and boss enemies +10% ATK and Max HP; extra +20% to each in Dreadful Foe and Sui's Remnant Consciousness

tongbaos.name: Risk-Eastern Gap
tongbaos.description: On toss, Elite and boss enemies gain +10 RES; extra +20 in Dreadful Foe and Sui's Remnant Consciousness

tongbaos.name: Risk-Northern Sting
tongbaos.description: On toss, Elite and boss enemies +10% Movement Speed; extra +20% in Dreadful Foe and Sui's Remnant Consciousness

tongbaos.name: Risk-Southern Mounts
tongbaos.description: On toss, Elite and boss enemies +15% DEF; extra +35% in Dreadful Foe and Sui's Remnant Consciousness

tongbaos.name: Bal-Soil to Metal
tongbaos.description: On toss, +4 Ingots (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Bal-Water to Wood
tongbaos.description: On toss, +2 Objective Shield (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Bal-Metal to Water
tongbaos.description: On toss, +1 Hope (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Flower - Fire to Soil
tongbaos.description: On toss, +1 Max Life Point (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Bal-Wood to Fire
tongbaos.description: On toss, all enemies -30% Max HP (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Bal-Cold
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators deployed on rightmost Vagary Tiles +60% ATK

tongbaos.name: Bal-Gale
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators deployed on rightmost Vagary Tiles +60 ASPD

tongbaos.name: Bal-Rain
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators deployed on rightmost Vagary Tiles +100% HP

tongbaos.name: Bal-Thunder
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators deployed on rightmost Vagary Tiles +100% DEF

tongbaos.name: Bal-Drought
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators deployed on leftmost Vagary Tiles +100% DEF

tongbaos.name: Bal-Rainbow
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators deployed on leftmost Vagary Tiles +60 ASPD

tongbaos.name: Bal-Rime
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators deployed on leftmost Vagary Tiles +100% HP

tongbaos.name: Bal-Frost
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators deployed on leftmost Vagary Tiles +60% ATK

tongbaos.name: Flower-Long Road
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators deployed on leftmost and rightmost Vagary Tiles +30% ATK and +30 ASPD

tongbaos.name: Flower-Martial Fight
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies +20% ATK. Extra +20% ATK on each successive toss (Stacks up to 2 times)

tongbaos.name: Flower-Trades
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies +25% HP. Extra +25% HP on each successive toss (Stacks up to 3 times)

tongbaos.name: Risk-Study
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies +200 DEF but Frozen for 5s on deployment. Extra +100 DEF on each successive toss

tongbaos.name: Bal-Testee
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies +80 ASPD. -20 ASPD buff on each successive toss, until 0

tongbaos.name: Bal-Prevention
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies +4 layers of Shield when deployed. -1 layer of Shield on each successive toss, until 0

tongbaos.name: Bal-To Move Mounts
tongbaos.description: On toss, all enemies +2000 DEF, but -150 DEF on taking damage (Stacks up to 25 times)

tongbaos.name: Bal-Trailblazer
tongbaos.description: On toss, HP, ATK Initial SP, and DP Cost of 2 random Operators +100% every battle

tongbaos.name: Flower-Mindfulness
tongbaos.description: +2 Max Life Points when tossed. +2 Life Points after each battle

tongbaos.name: Flower-Unclouded
tongbaos.description: On toss, 1 extra Life Point drops after battle. +1 Max Life Point after each non-combat node

tongbaos.name: Flower-Ideas Carried
tongbaos.description: On toss, a random node become 'explored' in Sui's Remnant Consciousness; can refresh 2 nodes when in effect in Garden of Grotesqueries

tongbaos.name: Flower-The Way In
tongbaos.description: On toss in Garden of Grotesqueries, can refresh nodes to Wander into Wonderland with entry to Shifei Border, once only

tongbaos.name: Bal-Tactile Token
tongbaos.description: When tossed in Garden of Grotesqueries, can refresh nodes to Rogue Trader, once only

tongbaos.name: Flower-Step by Step
tongbaos.description: When in Coffer, +2 Ingots when you pass a node (Turns into Dayan Tongbao after)

tongbaos.name: Bal-Debts Unending
tongbaos.description: +6 Max Life Points when added to Coffer; On toss, -1 Max Life Point when passing non-combat nodes (min 1)

tongbaos.name: Flower-Garden Trip
tongbaos.description: When in Coffer, Operators return from Scout nodes with more Coupons; On toss in Garden of Grotesqueries, can refresh nodes to Scout nodes, once only

tongbaos.name: Risk-Myriad Aspects
tongbaos.description: On toss, all Operators' ATK is shuffled at the start of battle

tongbaos.name: Risk-Firestarter
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies gain +30% ATK and +30% Redeployment Time

tongbaos.name: Bal-Quick Steps
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators on Vagary Tiles -30% Redeployment Time when defeated or retreated

tongbaos.name: Bal-Land Shift
tongbaos.description: On toss, Operators on Vagary Tiles refund 100% DP when retreated

tongbaos.name: Bal-Heavy Armor
tongbaos.description: On toss, all allies +50% DEF and HP, but +5 DP Cost
